name: Dian Wei
page_title: Dian Wei 典韋 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Rather than two axes or long polearms Dian Wei used two hand-halberds. These were shortened versions of the ji halberd (as used by Lü Bu).
	Dian Wei was neither drunk nor had his halberds been stolen during his heroic defense against Zhang Xiu’s attack.

full_text:
Dian Wei 典韋
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dian Wei (典韋)was born in Ji Wu County, Chen Liu Kingdom (Presently He Sui County in He Nan Province). Served Wei. One of Cao Cao’s trusted guards. Dian Man’s father. Dian Wei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Dian Wei lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Rather than two axes or long polearms Dian Wei used two hand-halberds. These were shortened versions of thejihalberd (as used by Lü Bu).
Dian Wei was neither drunk nor had his halberds been stolen during his heroic defense against Zhang Xiu’s attack.
